name: Curried Fall Vegetables with Lentils
recipeIngredient: 1 Pepper squash or other winter squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over lentils for any stones or impurities.
2. Rinse them in a sieve under cold running water. Drain well and set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium heat. Sauté onions and garlic for about 3 minutes or until softened.
4. Stir in cumin, coriander, turmeric, pepper, and chilies. Cook, stirring, for 30 seconds.
5. Add lentils to coat well with oil. Stir in lemon juice and stock. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, peel squash and cut into 1-inch pieces (about 4 cups). Cut cauliflower into small florets (about 6 cups).
8. Cut red pepper into thin strips. Trim beans and cut into halves.
9. Stir squash and cauliflower into the lentil mixture. Bring to a boil again, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for another 5 minutes.
10. Stir in red pepper and beans, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Add salt and peanuts. Cook uncovered for another 5 minutes or until all vegetables are tender and lentils have formed a thick sauce.
12. Adjust seasonings to taste. Serve over hot rice. The curry will thicken if made ahead and reheated. If needed, add more stock or water.
